solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def maxScoreSightseeingPair(self, values: List[int]) -> int:
        max_score = 0
        max_val = values[0]
        for i in range(1, len(values)):
            max_score = max(max_score, max_val + values[i] - i)
            max_val = max(max_val, values[i] + i)
        return max_score
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution iterates through the array once, keeping track of the maximum value seen so far and the maximum score that can be achieved with the current maximum value. This approach has a time complexity of O(n) and a space complexity of O(1), making it efficient for large inputs.
